review: Writing a review for Mary Stidham is difficult, because I fear anything I say will sound unbelievable or contrived. The problem is, Mary is truly as wonderful as all the superlative adjectives I can think up. Mary is a community builder in her bones, and we first encountered and came to know and love her through her clear passion for the Bellingham community. The first time my spouse and I visited Bellingham, we inadvertently found ourselves using her online recommendations as a check list of all the best places to visit and best things to see throughout the area. We finally began remarking on how great her taste is - and as we fell in love with the community, knew we had to reach out to talk to her about looking for our new home. Expecting to schedule a phone consultation some time in the coming weeks or months, Mary responded immediately and suggested we meet for coffee that Saturday morning and to chat about our thoughts and plans. From our initial meeting she was friendly, brilliant, and understanding of our wacky situation. Over the next several months from across the country we stayed in touch, us sharing homes we found online that looked interesting and her sharing thoughtful feedback. One of the things I loved about Mary is that she is real, honest, and human. She would tell us "I know that home looks great online, but I don't think it would be a perfect fit for you because (reasons)." Looking at homes from across the country, this thoughtful feedback was worth its weight in gold, time after time! Months after our initial meeting, when we finally flew out to do some serious house hunting, Mary arranged her schedule around our visit, devoted multiple very long days to shepherding us all around the area, and was unbelievably patient as we looked at some houses over and over. She guided us through a quick and challenging negotiation process when we finally made our offer, of course got us our home, and then held our hands for the long weeks to close. Above and beyond doesn't begin to describe her in that time - from helping find a fantastic inspector who came out on a Sunday morning before we had to drive to SeaTac and fly back across the country to installing our mailbox and window treatments in the new home (who does that?!? What kind of person goes that far for a client???), Mary is so far beyond exceptional it cannot be accurately conveyed. One of the (many) things I love about Mary is not only is she kind and thoughtful, she's human and understanding - if something went (temporarily!) awry, Mary isn't a person who would tell you it's okay, it will all be alright, ... (despite those things of course being true!) - she is empathetic, and would vehemently agree if a situation wasn't right, and it's fair for us to be frustrated, and the was going to do whatever needed to be done to get it right! Anyone looking for an exceptionally talented real estate agent, a wonderful human being, and a new friend in Bellingham has no need to look any further than Mary Stidham. However many stars the review system offers, she deserves more. Good luck house hunters! :)
Mary was super easy to work with and I found a house in no time! She's responsive, has good ideas, has good contacts, and is knowledgeable, warm, and friendly. I highly recommend her!

businessResponse.comment: Thank you so much for such a nice review! I loved working with you and Chad as well and I absolutely love the house you two bought.

review: Mary helped my husband & I purchase our home. She didn't just go the extra mile, she went the extra ten thousand miles! She was there from start to finish, holding our hands the entire home buying process! For all of your real estate needs, contact Mary!

I just moved to Bellingham this year and found Mary through her Facebook group, Bellingham Living. I chose to contact her because it was apparent in reading her posts that she was a positive, caring, kind, down-to-earth and interesting person who also happened to have a lot of real estate experience and knowledge. I am so glad I did! Mary not only has a lot of experience and all of the attributes I mentioned earlier but she encouraged me to stay positive when I started to lose hope about finding a house in this this dreadfully competitive market. And, sure enough, we finally found a house that works AND, most importantly, she was able to win the bid for us. I am so thankful for her help as I now get to live in Bellingham! Plus as a nice bonus, I found someone I can call a friend. Contact her, you'll be glad you did!
